name: Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thick.
2. Gradually add sugar to the beaten eggs.
3. Incorporate margarine into the mixture.
4. Mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, and spices in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually combine this dry mixture with the creamed ingredients (honey and coffee) into the egg mixture.
6. Add mashed banana to the batter.
7. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled and floured tube pan or two nine-inch loaf pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
9. Turn off heat and let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
10. Allow the cake to cool thoroughly before slicing.
Note: Honey Cake contains approximately 1 teaspoon of sugar per serving.
